goal: Collect 10,000 power as fast as possible on 8x8 farm with single drone

iterations.name: Baseline
iterations.description: Simple serpentine traversal: till all tiles, plant sunflowers, harvest when ready, replant. No petal optimization, no water, no fertilizer.

iterations.name: Watering
iterations.description: Added use_item(Items.Water, 4) on every tile during serpentine traversal.
iterations.changes_from_previous: Added watering on every tile. Increased time due to extra action overhead without complementary petal optimization.

iterations.name: Petal Order + Water + Fertilizer
iterations.description: Descending petal-order harvesting with goto navigation. Combined plant+measure+water pass, then harvest highest-petal tiles first using fertilizer backup for ungrown tiles.
iterations.changes_from_previous: Implemented petal binning (no sort/lambda needed), optimized goto with shortest-direction wrapping, fixed critical position-tracking bug across batches.

iterations.name: Serpentine Harvest Passes
iterations.description: Replaced goto with 9 full serpentine passes (one per petal level). Hypothesis: spatial traversal cheaper than goto.
iterations.changes_from_previous: Serpentine passes much worse than goto: 9x63 moves vs ~55x4 goto moves. Reverted approach.

iterations.name: Nearest-Neighbor Routing
iterations.description: Added nearest-neighbor tile selection within each petal group during harvest. Tracks drone position across batch boundaries.
iterations.changes_from_previous: Nearest-neighbor routing reduces avg goto distance from ~4.5 to ~3.8 moves per harvest.

iterations.name: Micro-Optimizations
iterations.description: Harvest 55 tiles per batch (sf_count=10 still qualifies for bonus). Only water newly planted tiles. Inlined distance computation.
iterations.changes_from_previous: Harvesting 55 instead of 54 saves 1 batch. Skipping water on already-grown tiles saves ~2000 ticks/batch.

iterations.name: Final Optimized
iterations.description: Precomputed HALF constant for direction comparisons. Shorter variable names reduce AST overhead. Tighter control flow.
iterations.changes_from_previous: Minor code-level optimizations. Also explored replant-in-harvest approach but abandoned due to residual water causing petal-order interference.

iterations.name: Merged Till + Shrinking NN
iterations.description: Two optimizations: (1) Merged the separate till pass into the combined pass using a first-batch flag, eliminating 63 wasted moves at unpowered speed. (2) Replaced visited-array nearest-neighbor with a shrinking-list approach using pre-separated x/y arrays—swap-remove visited tiles so inner loop shrinks each step, cutting iterations from n^2 to n(n+1)/2 and reducing subscript overhead.
iterations.changes_from_previous: Eliminated separate till traversal (saves ~4.1s on first batch at unpowered speed). Shrinking-list NN cuts inner loop iterations ~43% and removes per-tile visited checks.

iterations.name: Serpentine Combined Pass
iterations.description: Replaced always-North column traversal with boustrophedon (alternating North/South) serpentine. Saves 9 moves per batch (7 per column instead of 8, no wrap-around; skip last East). Used get_pos_x()/get_pos_y() for tile coordinates instead of computing (sx+dx)%SIZE. Precomputed SZ1=SIZE-1 to avoid BinOp in step<SIZE-1 checks.
iterations.changes_from_previous: Serpentine traversal eliminates 9 wasted wrap-around moves per batch = 1,800 ticks/batch. Over ~23 batches: ~41,400 ticks saved (~6.7s).

iterations.name: Harvest Phase Optimizations
iterations.description: Three stacked harvest-phase optimizations: (1) Pre-separated ptx/pty arrays eliminate the per-group copy loop. (2) Inlined goto and manual cx/cy tracking eliminates 4 get_pos calls per harvest target. (3) Early-exit NN search when d<2 (adjacent tile found—minimum possible distance).
iterations.changes_from_previous: Eliminated copy loop (saves ~5,800 ticks/run), removed get_pos overhead in NN+goto (saves ~5,100 ticks/run), early-exit NN on adjacent tiles (saves ~8,000 ticks/run).
